cors_rule.description: Defines CORS settings for storage, including headers, methods, origins, and max age
cors_rule.type: list(object({allowed_headers: list(string),allowed_methods: list(string),allowed_origins: list(string),exposed_headers: list(string),max_age_in_seconds: number}))

hour_metrics.description: Configures hourly metrics, including API tracking and data retention settings

logging.description: Controls logging settings for read, write, and delete operations with retention policies
logging.type: list(object({delete: bool,read: bool,retention_policy_days: optional(number),version: string,write: bool}))

minute_metrics.description: Configures per-minute metrics, including API tracking and retention policies

storage_account_id.description: References the unique ID of the associated storage account (mandatory)

timeouts.description: Defines timeout durations for create, read, update, and delete operations
